case h.mk
R : Type u_1
B : Type u_2
F : Type u_3
E : B → Type u_4
inst✝⁸ : Semiring R
inst✝⁷ : TopologicalSpace F
inst✝⁶ : TopologicalSpace B
inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace (TotalSpace F E)
e : Trivialization F TotalSpace.proj
x : TotalSpace F E
b✝ : B
y : E b✝
inst✝⁴ : AddCommMonoid F
inst✝³ : Module R F
inst✝² : (x : B) → AddCommMonoid (E x)
inst✝¹ : (x : B) → Module R (E x)
b : B
x✝ : E b
toPartialHomeomorph✝ : PartialHomeomorph (TotalSpace F E) (B × F)
baseSet✝ : Set B
open_baseSet✝ : IsOpen baseSet✝
source_eq✝ : toPartialHomeomorph✝.source = TotalSpace.proj ⁻¹' baseSet✝
target_eq✝ : toPartialHomeomorph✝.target = baseSet✝ ×ˢ univ
proj_toFun✝ : ∀ p ∈ toPartialHomeomorph✝.source, (↑toPartialHomeomorph✝ p).1 = p.proj
inst✝ :
  Trivialization.IsLinear R
    { toPartialHomeomorph := toPartialHomeomorph✝, baseSet := baseSet✝, open_baseSet := open_baseSet✝,
      source_eq := source_eq✝, target_eq := target_eq✝, proj_toFun := proj_toFun✝ }
⊢ (Trivialization.linearMapAt R
        { toPartialHomeomorph := toPartialHomeomorph✝, baseSet := baseSet✝, open_baseSet := open_baseSet✝,
          source_eq := source_eq✝, target_eq := target_eq✝, proj_toFun := proj_toFun✝ }
        b)
      x✝ =
    if
        b ∈
          { toPartialHomeomorph := toPartialHomeomorph✝, baseSet := baseSet✝, open_baseSet := open_baseSet✝,
              source_eq := source_eq✝, target_eq := target_eq✝, proj_toFun := proj_toFun✝ }.baseSet then
      (↑{ toPartialHomeomorph := toPartialHomeomorph✝, baseSet := baseSet✝, open_baseSet := open_baseSet✝,
              source_eq := source_eq✝, target_eq := target_eq✝, proj_toFun := proj_toFun✝ }
          { proj := b, snd := x✝ }).2
    else 0
